examples: Whisk the batter with a wire whisk or hand beater until it is smooth and light.
Sucre reluctantly takes the egg beater and begins to drill.
A fast-growing industry in which Britain is a world beater: what could go wrong?
Maybe you buy a new car after 20 years of driving that old beater around.
She was a good inch or two taller: a fare-beater at the ripe age of 6.
